impact: When CCP ships a new SDE (new systems, new gate connections like Yulai↔Manifest in the recent expansion), the admin "Force Update SDE" button only refreshes DB tables. The k-space star map at /map reads three static JSON files (systems.json, edges.json, regions.json) baked into the Vite bundle at build time, so the on-screen topology stays stale until someone manually runs `python scripts/build_map_data.py` and re-deploys the frontend. W-space map is unaffected (it reads from /api/map/wormholes-data/* which is DB-backed). Fix options: (a) add a FastAPI endpoint that serves these three JSONs from a writable runtime path, and have the SDE update flow regenerate them from the now-fresh DB tables; (b) call build_map_data.py from the SDE update flow and write into the runtime path; (c) leave static files for caching but also expose a runtime-override endpoint when fresher data exists on disk. Option (a) is cleanest — DB → JSON via the same projection logic build_map_data.py already does, written to /data/map/*.json, served by FastAPI with no-store. Manually unblocked on 2026-05-19 by running build_map_data.py locally and committing the regenerated JSONs (commit 7c8f43d).
resolution:
Wired map-JSON regeneration into the SDE update flow:

1. **scripts/build_map_data.py** — factored out reusable `build_from_zip(zf, output_dir)` function so the same projection logic powers both the CLI and the runtime call from the SDE loader.
2. **app/sde/loader.py** — after a successful SDE import, calls `build_from_zip` with the same in-memory zip, writing fresh systems.json/edges.json/regions.json to `/data/map/` (persistent app_data volume). Failure here is non-fatal — the SDE import itself still completes.
3. **app/routes/starmap.py** — added `/api/map/kspace-data/{file}` endpoint serving from `/data/map/` with `Cache-Control: no-store`, falling back to the Vite static bundle at `frontend/dist/data/` when the runtime file isn't present yet (first boot before any SDE import).
4. **frontend/src/components/StarMap/useMapData.ts** — switched K-space URLs from the static `${base}data/...` paths to `/api/map/kspace-data/...`, mirroring the runtime pattern already used for W-space.

Net effect: future SDE force-updates from the admin panel will pick up new systems and gate connections (like the Yulai↔Manifest connection that surfaced this issue) without any manual `python scripts/build_map_data.py` run or frontend rebuild. The Vite-bundled JSONs remain as initial-boot seed.

Commits: pending deploy.
title: SDE force-update doesn't refresh k-space star map static JSONs
